zh.lifeSummary: Lovey Bunker是Bunker的女兒，於1738年出生在美國新罕布夏州貝爾納普巴恩斯亞德。她於1758年與Samuel Drew結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1807年在美國新罕布夏州斯特拉福德多福享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lovey Bunker是Bunker的女儿，于1738年出生在美国新罕布什尔州貝爾納普巴恩斯亞德。她于1758年与Samuel Drew结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1807年在美国新罕布什尔州斯特拉福德多福享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bunker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname, of Norman origin, for a reliable or good-hearted person, from Old French bon ‘good’ + cuer ‘heart’ (from Latin cor).
History: Bunker Hill in Charlestown, MA, was named as land assigned in 1634 to George Bunker of Charlestown, who had emigrated from Odell in Bedfordshire, England.

variants.name: Banker
meanings: English: from Middle English banker, banc(o)ur, bankquer, bankert ‘covering of tapestry or other fabric for a bench, couch, or chair; ornamental hanging’, possibly a nickname or occupational name for someone who made or sold such things.
English: occupational name possibly from Middle English benker, seemingly ‘maker of benches’ but recorded only in names.
English: perhaps a variant of   Bunker  .

variants.name: Bunkers
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English   Bunker  .
In some cases possibly also Dutch: perhaps a variant of Benkers, itself a cognate of German Benkert . The surname Bunkers is very rare in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Boenker
meanings: occupational name for a carpenter, a rounded form of   Benker  .

nameMeanings.name: Lovey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Loveye (Old English Lēofwīg).

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.

en.lifeSummary: Lovey Bunker was born in 1738, in Barnstead, Belknap, New Hampshire, United States as the daughter of Bunker. She married Samuel Drew in 1758. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1807, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 70.

it.lifeSummary: Lovey Bunker è nata il nel 1738 nel Barnstead, Belknap, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America come figlia di Bunker. Lei sposato Samuel Drew nel 1758. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1807, nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lovey Bunkerは1738年にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ベルクナップバーンステアドでBunkerの娘として生まれた。1758年にSamuel Drewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1807年にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ストラフォードドバーで70歳で死去した。

ko.Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial A: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 도버
ko.lifeSummary: Lovey Bunker(은)는 1738년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 벨냅 바른스테아드에서 Bunker의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1758년 Samuel Drew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1807년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 스트래퍼드 도버에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lovey Bunker nasceu em 1738, em Barnstead, Belknap, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América filha de Bunker. Ela casou-se com Samuel Drew em 1758. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1807, em Dover, Strafford, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, com 70 anos.

ru.Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial A: довир, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Lovey Bunker родилась в 1738 г. в местности барнстид, белнап, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты. Её отца звали Bunker. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Drew в 1758 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1807 г. в местности довир, страффорд, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lovey Bunker nació en 1738, en Barnstead, Belknap, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos como hija de Bunker. Se casó con Samuel Drew en 1758. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1807, en Dover, Strafford, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 70 años.
